title: Error state hardening and test coverage for ContactsSection, PipelineStagesEditor, NewEventForm, DashboardToolbar, and SettingsPipelineSection
description: PRD-40 addresses five gaps found in a post-PRD-39 audit: (1) ContactsSection swallows fetch errors from useApplicationContacts — users see 'No contacts yet.' on a network failure with no retry path; (2) ContactsSection has no test coverage despite being a compound CRUD component; (3) PipelineStagesEditor is a drag-to-reorder settings component with validation logic but no tests; (4) NewEventForm is a modal form with no tests; (5) DashboardToolbar and SettingsPipelineSection — high-traffic components with no tests.

userStories.title: ContactsSection swallows useApplicationContacts fetch errors — add error state, retry, and test coverage
userStories.description: ContactsSection.jsx calls useApplicationContacts(applicationId) but only destructures data and isLoading (line 16). When the contacts endpoint fails, the loading indicator disappears and 'No contacts yet.' is shown — users believe they have no contacts when in fact there was a network failure. Destructure error and refetch, show an inline error message with a retry button, and add a full test suite.
acceptanceCriteria: useApplicationContacts destructures error and refetch in addition to data and isLoading
When error is truthy, a message 'Failed to load contacts.' renders as role='alert'
A retry button with aria-label='Retry loading contacts' calls refetch
Retry button uses BUTTON_SECONDARY design token
Test file created: frontend/src/components/ContactsSection.test.jsx
Test: 'should show loading state while contacts are fetching'
Test: 'should show error state with retry when contacts fetch fails'
Test: 'should call refetch when retry is clicked'
Test: 'should show empty state when no contacts'
Test: 'should render a ContactCard for each contact'
Test: 'should toggle to link mode when Link button is clicked'
Test: 'should toggle to new mode when New button is clicked'
Mocks useApplicationContacts from hooks/useContacts
Mocks ContactCard and ContactLinkDropdown and ContactForm as stubs
No existing tests broken
userStories.rationale: ContactsSection is shown in the detail panel for every application. A silent 'No contacts yet.' on failure causes users to think their networking data is gone — the highest-trust feature in the app. The fix follows the same useQuery error pattern used in US-368, US-371.

userStories.title: PipelineStagesEditor has no tests — add PipelineStagesEditor.test.jsx
userStories.description: PipelineStagesEditor.jsx is the drag-to-reorder stage editor used in SettingsPipelineSection. It has local validation (min 2 stages, max 10 stages), add/remove/rename logic, and an async save callback. None of this is tested. Add a test suite covering the main paths.
acceptanceCriteria: Test file created: frontend/src/components/PipelineStagesEditor.test.jsx
Test: 'should render initial stages list'
Test: 'should show validation error when fewer than 2 stages after remove'
Test: 'should add a new stage when Add is clicked'
Test: 'should call onSave with stage names when Save stages is clicked'
Test: 'should show saveError prop as an error message'

Mocks @dnd-kit/core (DndContext, useSensor, useSensors, PointerSensor, KeyboardSensor) and @dnd-kit/sortable (SortableContext, useSortable, sortableKeyboardCoordinates, verticalListSortingStrategy, arrayMove)
Tests follow Arrange → Act → Assert with blank lines between sections
No existing tests broken
userStories.rationale: PipelineStagesEditor is a settings-level CRUD component with non-trivial validation. Regressions in stage count limits or save behavior would be invisible without tests.

userStories.title: NewEventForm has no tests — add NewEventForm.test.jsx
userStories.description: NewEventForm.jsx is the modal form for adding calendar events. It renders a dialog with application search, event type/date/time/notes fields, and Save/Cancel buttons. The business logic is in useNewEventForm, but the modal shell (render, close on Cancel, submit delegation, pending state) has no tests.
acceptanceCriteria: Test file created: frontend/src/components/NewEventForm.test.jsx
Test: 'should render the modal dialog'
Test: 'should call onClose when Cancel is clicked'
Test: 'should call onClose when the X close button is clicked'
Test: 'should disable Save Event button while form is pending'
Mocks useNewEventForm from hooks/useNewEventForm
Mocks useAppSelector from hooks/useAppSelector
Mocks NewEventFormFields as a simple stub to avoid deep rendering
Tests follow Arrange → Act → Assert with blank lines between sections
No existing tests broken
userStories.rationale: NewEventForm is the primary entry point for calendar event creation, opened from multiple places (Calendar page, Dashboard). Without tests, modal lifecycle regressions (double-close, stuck pending state) go undetected.

userStories.title: DashboardToolbar has no tests — add DashboardToolbar.test.jsx
userStories.description: DashboardToolbar.jsx is the header toolbar for Dashboard with view toggle (list/kanban), Import CSV, Export CSV (with pending spinner), and Add Application buttons. It is a pure presentational component with well-defined props — easy to test and high-value as a regression guard.
acceptanceCriteria: Test file created: frontend/src/components/DashboardToolbar.test.jsx
Test: 'should render Dashboard heading'
Test: 'should mark list view button as pressed when viewMode is list'
Test: 'should mark kanban view button as pressed when viewMode is kanban'
Test: 'should call onSetViewMode with list when List view is clicked'
Test: 'should call onSetViewMode with kanban when Kanban view is clicked'
Test: 'should show spinner and disable Export CSV while isExporting'
Test: 'should call onAdd when Add Application is clicked'
No mocks required — component is purely presentational
Tests follow Arrange → Act → Assert with blank lines between sections
No existing tests broken
userStories.rationale: DashboardToolbar is rendered on every Dashboard visit. The view toggle, import/export, and add buttons are core workflow entry points. Pure presentational components are the easiest to test — no reason to leave them uncovered.

userStories.title: SettingsPipelineSection has no tests — add SettingsPipelineSection.test.jsx
userStories.description: SettingsPipelineSection.jsx composes PipelineStagesEditor and WeeklyGoalSection, wires them to useUpdateUser mutations, and shows success/error banners. It is the primary Settings page section for pipeline management and has no tests.
acceptanceCriteria: Test file created: frontend/src/components/SettingsPipelineSection.test.jsx
Test: 'should render Pipeline Stages heading'
Test: 'should show PipelineStagesEditor when user has stages'
Test: 'should show success banner after save'
Test: 'should show streak badge when user has a weekly streak'
Mocks useAuth from context/AuthContext
Mocks useUpdateUser from hooks/useAuth
Mocks PipelineStagesEditor as a stub that calls onSave with a test stage list
Mocks WeeklyGoalSection as a stub
Tests follow Arrange → Act → Assert with blank lines between sections
No existing tests broken
userStories.rationale: SettingsPipelineSection orchestrates mutation callbacks and success/error state from two sub-components. Without tests, the save flow and banner rendering logic are unverified.
